channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Every 27 minutes, someone is killed in Sudan’s war
item.description: Every day, over the last three years in Sudan, 53 people on average are killed.

item.title: US-Iran talks: What’s the latest on mediation efforts?
item.description: Tehran rejects US conditions on nuclear arms; sanctions relief and strait control fuel diplomatic deadlock in Islamabad.

item.title: What are Iran’s $100bn in frozen assets and where are they held?
item.description: Iran wants the US to release its frozen assets as part of talks. The money could help it rebuild its battered economy.

item.title: As world focuses on Iran, Israel ‘engineering starvation policy’ in Gaza
item.description: The weaponisation of logistics has caused severe shortage of fuel, food and medicines piling misery on Palestinians.

item.title: Four people killed in Turkiye’s second school shooting in two days
item.description: Three students and a teacher are killed in the south-central province of ​Kahramanmaras, governor says.

item.title: Asian Cup 2027 draw in Saudi Arabia moved to May 9 over Iran war
item.description: Draw for the 24-team 2027 AFC Asian Cup, originally set for Saturday, moved to May 9.

item.title: Anger in Lebanon as Israel launches deadly strikes despite diplomatic drive
item.description: Hezbollah lawmaker Hassan Fadlallah says negotiating 'with the enemy is wrong', warns of 'internal division'.

item.title: Double standards? Why Iran’s nukes are scrutinised, Israel gets a pass
item.description: Israel’s policy of ambiguity about its nuclear capability contrasts sharply with the focus on Iran’s programme.

item.title: France’s Ekitike to miss World Cup after Liverpool Champions League injury
item.description: Liverpool striker Hugo Ekitike had to be stretchered off in the Champions League defeat by Paris Saint-Germain.

item.title: Iran citizen held in France over pro-Palestine comments returns home
item.description: Release of Mahdieh Esfandiari comes a week after Iran released two French citizens held on espionage charges.
